query:
UPDATE filterPresets 
SET minDelta = '0.10', maxDelta = '0.25', 
    minDte = 14, maxDte = 45,
    minRsi = 20, maxRsi = 70,
    minIvRank = 20, maxIvRank = 100,
    minBbPercent = '0', maxBbPercent = '0.7',
    minScore = 50,
    minOpenInterest = 50,
    minVolume = 30
WHERE userId = 1 AND strategy = 'csp' AND presetName = 'conservative';
